title: Warden Depths
description: A new Warden dimension with 3 biomes and associated quests !
body:
# The Warden Depths

This mod introduces a **brand-new dimension** to Minecraft: the **Warden Depths**.  
To access it, you must first obtain a **Warden Key**, dropped by the Warden itself, and bring it to the **giant portal frame** found in Ancient Cities.

Once inside, you’ll discover **three unique biomes** — the **Frozen Valley**, the **Trials!Forest**, and the **Warden Twilight**.  
Each biome is tied to a special quest that can be tracked in the **Warden Book**, rewarding you with the mythical items of the Warden once completed.

![Warden book menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4517011562f259723c2b47733743f500cb206984.png)

---

## ❄️ The Frozen Valley

A vast frozen wasteland of **snow and ice**, home to two new mobs: the **Yeti** and the **Snow Mole**.

![Yeti and Sow Mole](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/689a39e67e3e2c25816d8113b4e4666f7c2a72db.png)

Here, you can mine a new ore called **Ice Shard**, used to craft **frozen versions** of the chest and dispenser — upgraded variants of the vanilla blocks.  
You can also use it to build the **Offering Chest**, an essential part of one of the three Warden Book quests.  

![Offering Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e216677e10b7f70315812cada48d9e9b565d57f.png)

This quest is a **farming challenge**, where you must fill the chest with specific resources to complete your task.

![Offering Chest Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf82da539a65b1f9812564daab92b3c47dc96a8f.png)

Once fulfilled, you’ll earn the right to mine the **Primal Crystal**, which contains the **Warden Multitool** — a powerful artifact capable of breaking any block faster than any other tool.  

![Ice primal Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/324a25c6cfd72d841a36468b4ccee16967f23be9_0.webp)

It also allows you to **teleport to Warden Squids** roaming the biome, helping you travel faster across the dimension.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05fdd023a76ba8adbf133ada12f977bf3b1ed98a.png)

⚠️ **Beware:** The temperature in this biome is dangerously low!  
Keep a torch or another heat source in hand to avoid freezing and taking damage.

---

## 🌲 The Trials Forest

In this mystical, blue forest stands a massive structure: the **Tower of Trials**.  
Each floor presents a different challenge — **parkour**, **combat**, **puzzles**, and **mazes**.

![Tower of Trials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/781c42e4bf2d62dbc694ea40c1e4307cbd516a60_0.webp)

Your goal is to climb to the very top, where you’ll obtain the second mythical item: the **Warden Hammer**.

However, to break the ore at the summit, you’ll first need to **complete most of Minecraft’s achievements**, making this dimension truly **endgame content**.

  ![Warden Hammer Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83556ac593404c5e57cc31f72c8bc793668ed737.png)

---

## 🌌 The Warden Twilight

The final biome immerses you in total darkness.  
Navigate through waves of **Warden Blazes** and **Sculk Sensors** to reach the heart of the area — the **Warden Castle**.

![Warden Blazes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a88b978efc34cffbe7f809095a0b0fe577184474.png)

![Warden Castle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6ab53ecf233f061d987fcb6b8da626ae957bfb9.png)

Inside, you’ll find valuable loot, but your true objective lies deeper: defeating the **Mega Warden**, the ruler of the castle.  
Once slain, you’ll gain access to the final crystal, which holds the **Warden Dagger** — the last of the mythical items.

![Mega Warden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e90737b5008bfb36cd5ba2d997e849d626411833.png)

You’ll also encounter **Warden Berries**, a mysterious fruit that **stuns nearby mobs** when eaten.

![Warden Berries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68fd014d709b6e2fe79644cc8632c9ea755137ae.png)

---

> ⚒️ This entire mod was developed in just **one week** as part of a YouTube challenge — so there might still be a few bugs or missing details.  
Thanks for your understanding and support!
